entries.title: SK hynix and the Ministry of Climate, Energy and Environment Co-host ‘AI for Green Impact, Inspiring Young Minds to Shape a Greener Future
entries.summary: On June 5, World Environment Day SK hynix co-organized ‘AI for Green Impact,’ a hands-on educational program jointly hosted with the Ministry of Climate, Energy and Environment. The event took place at the Conference Hall on the third floor of COEX in Seoul. entries.title: SK hynix unveils ‘iHBM’ thermal solution to boost AI performance
entries.summary: News Highlights Seoul, May 26, 2026 – SK hynix Inc. (or “the company”, www.skhynix.com) announced today the launch of the iHBM solution that embeds integrated cooling elements(ICEs)1 within the high-bandwidth memory(HBM) package for next-generation HBM products. 1ICE(Integrated Cooling Elements): A cooling element made of electrically non-conductive, thermally conductive silicon-based material, designed to dissipate heat from the HBM package […] The post SK hynix unveils ‘iHBM’ thermal solution to boost AI performance first appeared on SK hynix Newsroom .
